chatDisclaimer: This assistant does not replace medical advice. In an emergency, call your local emergency number or go to the nearest ER.
chatWelcome:
Hello! I'm your pregnancy assistant.

I can help you with:
•  Nutrition
•  Symptoms
• 🩺 Medical exams
•  Sleep
• ‍ Exercise

Ask me your questions!
chatRateLimit: ⏳ Slow down! You're sending too many messages. Wait a few seconds before trying again
chatSeeTipHome: See the tip on the home screen
useAppForStats: Use the app for a few days to see your statistics appear!
defaultWarning: Stay alert for signs of fatigue.

facts.1: Baby can move arms and legs

facts.2: Sex may be visible on ultrasound

facts.0: Baby is ready to be born

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.text: Welcome to Mama & Bébé. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

usage.title: 3. Data Usage
usage.disclaimer: We NEVER sell your data to third parties.

storage.title: 4. Storage and Security
storage.text: Your data is securely stored on Firebase (Google Cloud) with encryption. Only you can access your personal data via your account.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.text: In accordance with GDPR, you have the right to:
rights.accessDesc: Request a copy of your data

contact.title: 6. Contact
contact.text: For any questions regarding your data or to exercise your rights:

guestMode.title: 7. Guest Mode
guestMode.text: If you use the app in guest mode, your data is stored only on your device and is not sent to our servers.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Using this application implies full acceptance of these Terms of Service.
terms.medical: MEDICAL DISCLAIMER: This app provides information for educational purposes only and does NOT replace professional medical advice.
terms.liability: The publisher cannot be held responsible for the use of the information provided.
terms.content: All content (text, images) is protected by copyright.

cookies.title: Cookies & Trackers
cookies.intro: We do not use advertising cookies.
cookies.tech: We use technical identifiers (AsyncStorage) for app functionality (local save).
cookies.analytics_desc: We use Sentry to detect crashes and improve stability.
cookies.firebase_desc: Used for secure authentication and database.

a11y.termsDisclaimer: By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

support.title: Support

Could not open the Mail app.

errorBoundary.title: Oops!
errorBoundary.message: A small error occurred. Don't worry, your data is safe.

chatResponse.unknownMessage:
I didn't quite understand your message. No worries! Try rephrasing, for example:

• 'I have a headache'
• 'What can I eat?'
• 'I'm tired'
• 'When should I get an ultrasound?'

I'm here to help
chatResponse.fallbackMessage:
‍ Hmm, I couldn't find information on this topic.

But I can help you with:
•  Diet & nutrition
•  Pregnancy symptoms
• 🩺 Medical exams
•  Sleep & fatigue
• ‍ Sports & physical activity
•  Birth preparation

Try rephrasing your question with these topics!
chatResponse.semanticMatch:
I found something that might interest you!

This article is about "{{title}}". I think it answers your question
chatResponse.redFlagCritical: Don't hesitate to contact your doctor or emergency services.
chatResponse.redFlagHigh: I recommend discussing this with your midwife or doctor.
chatResponse.redFlagModerate: Monitor the situation and consult if it persists.
chatResponse.redFlagWithArticle: This symptom deserves attention. Consult if it persists.
chatResponse.topicAlimentation: Great question about diet! Here's some useful info:
chatResponse.topicNutrition: Nutrition is very important during pregnancy! Here's what I know:
chatResponse.topicSymptomes: I understand this can be worrying. Here's some reassuring information:
chatResponse.topicSport: ‍ Staying active during pregnancy is great! Here are some tips:
chatResponse.topicSommeil: Sleep is precious! Here's what might help:
chatResponse.topicExamens: 🩺 Medical exams are important! Here's the information:
chatResponse.topicAccouchement: Interested in birth preparation? Here you go:
chatResponse.topicAllaitement: Breastfeeding is a wonderful topic! Here are some tips:
chatResponse.topicPreparation: Being well prepared is key! Here are my tips:
chatResponse.topicSexualite: That's an important question! Here's what I know:
chatResponse.topicNoArticles: I can help you with: {{label}}. Ask me your questions!
